rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §39.0511, which concerns federal accountability waiver requests for certain school district campuses serving students with significant cognitive disabilities.
quote: Sec. 39.0511. WAIVER REQUEST FOR CERTAIN FEDERAL ACCOUNTABILITY-RELATED REQUIREMENTS.
_note: No overlap between proposed property tax change and this education accountability waiver provision.
